audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:S + sẽ + V]]. Put sẽ before an action to present it as expected or planned in the future.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:S + sẽ + V]]: Sẽ is introduced as a prospective/future-time marker before the predicate; contextual future readings without sẽ remain possible.

audienceSections.normal:
#### S + sẽ + V

Put sẽ before an action to present it as expected or planned in the future. Example: [[grammar:Cuối tuần, tôi sẽ đi biển.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### S + sẽ + V

Sẽ is introduced as a prospective/future-time marker before the predicate; contextual future readings without sẽ remain possible. Literal example: [[grammar:Cuối tuần, tôi sẽ đi biển.]]

audienceSections.normal: `sẽ` clearly points to the future, especially for plans. A time phrase can sometimes make the future clear without `sẽ`, but this chapter uses it each time.
audienceSections.expert: Sẽ makes prospective time explicit, especially for plans. It is optional when another expression already makes future time clear, but this chapter keeps it overt. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Cuối tuần, tôi sẽ đi biển.]] — This weekend, I will go to the beach.
- [[grammar:Tôi sẽ thăm Maria Garcia.]] — I will visit Maria Garcia.
- [[grammar:Chuyến đi có kế hoạch.]] — The trip has a plan.
- [[grammar:Tôi sẽ đặt phòng.]] — I will book a room.
- [[grammar:Tôi sẽ nghỉ ngơi.]] — I will rest.
- [[grammar:Biển ở Việt Nam.]] — The sea is in Vietnam.
- [[grammar:Kế hoạch ở đây.]] — The plan is here.
- [[grammar:Cuối tuần, tôi sẽ đi.]] — This weekend, I will go.
- [[grammar:Tôi cũng sẽ nghỉ ngơi.]] — I will rest too.
- [[grammar:Chuyến đi sẽ bắt đầu đúng giờ.]] — The trip will begin on time.
- [[grammar:Vâng.]] — Yes.
- [[grammar:Kế hoạch đã sẵn sàng.]] — The plan is ready.

characters.heading: Sino-Vietnamese Vocabulary
characters.normal:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| kế hoạch | 計劃 | plan | `Chuyến đi có kế hoạch.` |

The characters show established Hán-Việt word parts for vocabulary first introduced in this chapter. Keep using the modern Vietnamese spellings from the reading.
characters.expert:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| kế hoạch | 計劃 | plan | `Chuyến đi có kế hoạch.` |

Expert context: the mappings record Vietnamese lexical history and constituent order, not a claim that modern Vietnamese writes these words in characters or that every sequence is a current Chinese lexical form.
